articles.title: The MCP facade: how agents talk to the backend without curl
articles.summary: An agent skill runs curl http://127.0.0.1:7200/api/v1/notes from inside its Docker sandbox. It fails with exit code 7 — "couldn't connect" — before authentication even runs, because the sandbox is launched with network: none. There is no loopback to reach. There is no network at all. Meanwhile, the...

articles.title: My requirements.txt Is Pinned. My MCP Server's Actual Contract Isn't, and Nothing Would Catch It Changing.
articles.summary: Back on 2026-07-14 I found and fixed a real landmine in this repo: requirements.txt had mcp[cli] with no version constraint at all.
